ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the university is located */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "university_type" TEXT /* Type of university (public/private) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university (city, state/province) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* University website URL */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Europe, Asia, Americas) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "world_rank" INTEGER /* World rank of the university */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the university */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., global, regional, subject-specific) */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., QS, THE, ARWU) */,
  "ranking_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "teaching_score" REAL /* Teaching quality score */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-faculty ratio */,
  "international_diversity_faculty" REAL /* International diversity of faculty */,
  "faculty_quality" TEXT /* Faculty quality metrics (e.g., PhD percentage) */,
  "teaching_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for teaching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "international_score" REAL /* International outlook score */,
  "international_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "international_staff" REAL /* Percentage of international staff */,
  "international_partnerships" INTEGER /* Number of international partnerships */,
  "internationalization_strategy" TEXT /* Internationalization strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "research_score" REAL /* Research output score */,
  "research_output_quality" TEXT /* Research output quality metrics (e.g., citation count, h-index) */,
  "research_income" REAL /* Research income */,
  "research_collaboration" REAL /* Research collaboration metrics (e.g., co-authorship, joint grants) */,
  "research_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "citation_score" REAL /* Citation impact score */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Citation count */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* h-index */,
  "g_index" INTEGER /* g-index */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Citation source (e.g., Scopus, Web of Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income score (can be a float or a string indicating missing data) */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Income source (e.g., government funding, industry funding, tuition fees) */,
  "income_allocation" TEXT /* Income allocation (e.g., research, teaching, administration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "num_students" TEXT /* Number of students */,
  "student_staff_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-staff ratio */,
  "international_students" TEXT /* Percentage of international students */,
  "female_male_ratio" TEXT /* Female-to-male ratio */,
  "student_satisfaction" REAL /* Student satisfaction metrics (e.g., satisfaction rate, graduate outcomes) */,
  "student_engagement_strategy" TEXT /* Student engagement strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, administration, library) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the university data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the university data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, teaching, administration) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university for which data was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data file */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data uploaded (e.g., ranking, metrics, student data) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality metrics for the uploaded data (e.g., completeness, accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
